scripts.start: bash -lc 'if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then cd backend && python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt && python3 -m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-10000}; elif command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then cd backend && python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && python -m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-10000}; else echo "Python not found on this Render runtime. Please deploy using render.yaml blueprint." && exit 1; fi'
